## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

List what you ran, or explain why testing was not needed.

## Public repo safety

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, private keys, local configs, logs, crash dumps, databases, or personal machine paths.
- [ ] I did not add generated planning files, temporary artifacts, or private notes.
- [ ] I did not reuse OmniStats branding or production service endpoints in a fork-specific change.
